response.global_analysis: Strict Verification Step: 1. The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for 'Bitter Choco Decoration'. 2. No incorrect song detected. 3. The reference JSON was slightly incomplete; I have added the final line heard at the end of the video ('さぁ ここらで一つ') and ignored silent sections at the start. 4. Subtitles match the full duration of vocalizations without early cutoffs, ensuring each block corresponds to a distinct vocal phrase and respects pauses.

subtitles.original: 人を過度に信じないように
subtitles.english: I try not to have too much faith in people

subtitles.original: 愛さないように期待しないように
subtitles.english: Not to love too much, not to expect too much

subtitles.original: かと言って角が立たないように
subtitles.english: On the other hand, I try not to cause offense

subtitles.original: 気取らぬように 目立たぬように
subtitles.english: Not to act high-and-mighty, not to stand out

subtitles.original: 誰一人傷つけぬように
subtitles.english: I try not to hurt anyone

subtitles.original: 虐めぬように 殺さぬように
subtitles.english: Not to bully anyone, not to kill anyone

subtitles.original: かと言って偽善がバレないように
subtitles.english: On the other hand, don't let hypocrisy be revealed

subtitles.original: 軽いジョークやリップサービスも忘れぬように
subtitles.english: And don't forget light jokes and lip service

subtitles.original: どんな時も笑って愛嬌振りまくように
subtitles.english: I try to smile and charm everyone at all times

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
兎角言わずにたんと召し上がれ
subtitles.english: Eat up, don't ask questions, just have some

subtitles.original: ビターチョコデコレーション
食わず嫌いはちゃんと直さなきゃ
subtitles.english: You have to fix your fussy eating habits properly

subtitles.original: 頭空っぽその後に残る心が
subtitles.english: If the heart left when your head is empty...

subtitles.original: きっと君だって同じ事
subtitles.english: Then I'm sure you'd do the same thing

subtitles.original: さぁ ここらで一つ
